limitations.text: NodeKit v0.2.0 is distributed through its GitHub source release because npm authentication returned E401.
The Casca FDE lab is local-ready and browser-proven on loopback, but not hosted or production-proven.
The Agentic RL lab currently implements behavior cloning and protected evaluation, not reinforcement-learning weight optimization.
The preregistered Azure-only/ZDR live baseline received HTTP 404 and was not retried with a weaker privacy or routing policy.
Founder Quest Graph uses a fictional California LLC. Synthetic receipts may prove workflow readiness but never government, bank, insurance, payment-provider, legal, tax, or regulatory approval.
The Anthropic grant is an independent external scenario; NodeKit is not affiliated with or endorsed by Anthropic and has not received the grant.

The public campaign attributes the graph-of-loops framing to Carlos E. Perez's essay and Peter Steinberger's originating prompt, while recognizing that directed graphs, state machines, and multi-agent orchestration predate the current terminology.
